parameters.query: WITH claimed AS (INSERT INTO phase8.events(idempotency_key,workflow,schema_version,correlation_id,content_hash,artifact_ref,status,owner) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,CASE WHEN $8 THEN 'received' ELSE 'exception' END,$7) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING 1) SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM claimed) AS claimed

parameters.jsCode: const result=$input.first().json;const must=(ok,code)=>{if(!ok)throw new Error('permanent:'+code)};if(result.error_class==='permanent')throw new Error('permanent:'+result.reason_code);must(result.statement&&Number.isInteger(result.statement.journal_id),'statement');must(Array.isArray(result.lines)&&result.lines.length>=1,'normalized_lines');for(const line of result.lines){must(typeof line.external_transaction_id==='string'&&typeof line.normalized_description==='string'&&Number.isInteger(line.amount_minor)&&line.amount_minor!==0,'normalized_line');}return [{json:result}];

const decode=raw=>{let value=raw.structuredContent??raw.content?.find(x=>x.type==='text')?.text??raw;for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(typeof value==='string'){value=JSON.parse(value);continue;}if(value&&typeof value==='object'&&!Array.isArray(value)&&Object.keys(value).length===1&&Object.hasOwn(value,'result')){value=value.result;continue;}break;}if(!value||typeof value!=='object'||Array.isArray(value)||value.error)throw new Error('invalid_mcp_result');return value};return $input.all().map((item,index)=>({json:decode(item.json),pairedItem:{item:index}}));

nodes.name: Match and Prepare Review Classify Error 1
Match and Prepare Review Classify Error 2
Match and Prepare Review Classify Error 3
Match and Prepare Review Classify Error 4

parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto');const must=(ok,code)=>{if(!ok)throw new Error('permanent:'+code)};const base=$('Validate Event').first().json;const result=$input.first().json;if(result.error_class==='permanent')throw new Error('permanent:'+result.reason_code);must(Array.isArray(result.lines)&&result.lines.every(line=>['one_to_one','one_to_many','partial','unmatched'].includes(line.classification)&&typeof line.confidence==='number'&&Array.isArray(line.evidence_refs)&&Array.isArray(line.candidates)),'bank_match_classification');must(result.review?.state==='pending'&&result.review?.owner==='Treasury Operations'&&result.review?.reconciliation_confirmation_allowed===false,'review_state');const payload=result.capability_payload;if(!payload||typeof payload!=='object'||Array.isArray(payload))throw new Error('permanent:missing_review_payload');const payload_hash='sha256:'+crypto.createHash('sha256').update(JSON.stringify(payload)).digest('hex');return [{json:{...base,approval_id:crypto.randomUUID(),capability:'import_bank_transaction_draft.v1',reviewer_role:'accounting_manager',payload_hash,payload,expires_at:new Date(Date.now()+15*60*1000).toISOString()}}];

parameters.query: WITH approval AS (INSERT INTO phase8.approvals(approval_id,idempotency_key,capability,payload_hash,payload,reviewer_role,state,expires_at) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5::jsonb,$6,'pending',$7) ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key,payload_hash) DO UPDATE SET expires_at=GREATEST(phase8.approvals.expires_at,EXCLUDED.expires_at) RETURNING approval_id,state,expires_at) UPDATE phase8.events SET status='review_pending',updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$2 RETURNING (SELECT approval_id FROM approval) approval_id,(SELECT state FROM approval) review_state,(SELECT expires_at FROM approval) expires_at

WITH e AS (SELECT idempotency_key,correlation_id,owner FROM phase8.events WHERE idempotency_key=$1), ins AS (INSERT INTO phase8.exceptions(exception_id,idempotency_key,error_class,reason_code,owner) SELECT md5($1 || ':' || $3)::uuid,e.idempotency_key,$2,$3,e.owner FROM e ON CONFLICT (exception_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING exception_id) UPDATE phase8.events SET status='exception',updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING COALESCE((SELECT exception_id FROM ins),md5($1 || ':' || $3)::uuid) exception_id,status

WITH e AS (SELECT idempotency_key,owner FROM phase8.events WHERE idempotency_key=$1), ins AS (INSERT INTO phase8.exceptions(exception_id,idempotency_key,error_class,reason_code,owner) SELECT md5($1 || ':' || $2)::uuid,e.idempotency_key,'permanent',$2,e.owner FROM e ON CONFLICT (exception_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING exception_id) UPDATE phase8.events SET status='exception',updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING COALESCE((SELECT exception_id FROM ins),md5($1 || ':' || $2)::uuid) exception_id,status

WITH decided AS (UPDATE phase8.approvals SET state=CASE WHEN $2='approved' THEN 'consumed' ELSE 'rejected' END,reviewer_id=$3,consumed_at=CASE WHEN $2='approved' THEN now() ELSE NULL END WHERE approval_id=$1 AND state='pending' AND expires_at>now() AND payload_hash=$4 AND reviewer_role=$5 RETURNING approval_id,idempotency_key,capability,payload_hash,payload,reviewer_id,state), event AS (UPDATE phase8.events e SET status=CASE WHEN d.state='consumed' THEN 'approved' ELSE 'rejected' END,updated_at=now() FROM decided d WHERE e.idempotency_key=d.idempotency_key RETURNING e.idempotency_key) SELECT d.*,d.state='consumed' AS approved FROM decided d JOIN event e USING(idempotency_key)

parameters.jsCode:
const crypto=require('crypto');const input=$input.first().json; const must=(ok,code)=>{if(!ok)throw new Error('permanent:'+code)}; const closed=(v,keys)=>{must(v&&typeof v==='object'&&!Array.isArray(v),'payload');const extra=Object.keys(v).filter(k=>!keys.includes(k));must(extra.length===0,'unknown_'+extra[0]);};const stable=v=>Array.isArray(v)?'['+v.map(stable).join(',')+']':v&&typeof v==='object'?'{'+Object.keys(v).sort().map(k=>JSON.stringify(k)+':'+stable(v[k])).join(',')+'}':JSON.stringify(v);const capabilityKey=(prefix,value)=>prefix+':v1:'+crypto.createHash('sha256').update(stable(value)).digest('hex');const texts=(values,min,max,length,unique,name)=>must(Array.isArray(values)&&values.length>=min&&values.length<=max&&values.every(v=>typeof v==='string'&&v.length>=1&&v.length<=length)&&(!unique||values.length===new Set(values).size),name); const operation=(model,values,more={})=>[{json:{instance:'ocloud-staging',model,values,context:{allowed_company_ids:[1],force_company:1,...more}}}]; 
const p=input.payload;closed(p,['journal_id','transaction_date','payment_reference','amount_minor','partner_id','foreign_currency_id','amount_currency_minor','external_transaction_id','evidence_refs','discrepancies','idempotency_key']);must(p.journal_id===6,'journal_id');must(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(p.transaction_date||''),'transaction_date');must(typeof p.payment_reference==='string'&&p.payment_reference.length>=1&&p.payment_reference.length<=200,'payment_reference');must(Number.isInteger(p.amount_minor)&&p.amount_minor!==0&&Math.abs(p.amount_minor)<=100000000000000,'amount_minor');must(p.partner_id===null||(Number.isInteger(p.partner_id)&&p.partner_id>0),'partner_id');must((p.foreign_currency_id===null)===(p.amount_currency_minor===null),'foreign_currency_pair');if(p.foreign_currency_id!==null){must(Number.isInteger(p.foreign_currency_id)&&p.foreign_currency_id>0,'foreign_currency_id');must(Number.isInteger(p.amount_currency_minor)&&p.amount_currency_minor!==0&&Math.abs(p.amount_currency_minor)<=100000000000000,'amount_currency_minor');}must(typeof p.external_transaction_id==='string'&&p.external_transaction_id.length>=1&&p.external_transaction_id.length<=128,'external_transaction_id');texts(p.evidence_refs,1,20,512,true,'evidence_refs');texts(p.discrepancies,0,50,500,false,'discrepancies');must(p.idempotency_key===capabilityKey('bank-transaction',{capability:'import_bank_transaction_draft.v1',instance_id:'ocloud-staging',company_id:1,journal_id:p.journal_id,transaction_date:p.transaction_date,payment_reference:p.payment_reference,amount_minor:p.amount_minor,partner_id:p.partner_id,foreign_currency_id:p.foreign_currency_id,amount_currency_minor:p.amount_currency_minor,external_transaction_id:p.external_transaction_id,evidence_refs:p.evidence_refs,discrepancies:p.discrepancies}),'idempotency_key');const values={journal_id:p.journal_id,company_id:1,date:p.transaction_date,payment_ref:p.payment_reference,amount:p.amount_minor/100};if(p.partner_id!==null)values.partner_id=p.partner_id;if(p.foreign_currency_id!==null){values.foreign_currency_id=p.foreign_currency_id;values.amount_currency=p.amount_currency_minor/100;}return operation('account.bank.statement.line',values);

const decode=raw=>{let value=raw.structuredContent??raw.content?.find(x=>x.type==='text')?.text??raw;for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(typeof value==='string'){value=JSON.parse(value);continue;}if(value&&typeof value==='object'&&!Array.isArray(value)&&Object.keys(value).length===1&&Object.hasOwn(value,'result')){value=value.result;continue;}break;}if(!value||typeof value!=='object'||Array.isArray(value)||value.error)throw new Error('invalid_mcp_result');return value};return $input.all().map((item,index)=>({json:decode(item.json),pairedItem:{item:index}}));

const decode=raw=>{let value=raw.structuredContent??raw.content?.find(x=>x.type==='text')?.text??raw;for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(typeof value==='string'){value=JSON.parse(value);continue;}if(value&&typeof value==='object'&&!Array.isArray(value)&&Object.keys(value).length===1&&Object.hasOwn(value,'result')){value=value.result;continue;}break;}if(!value||typeof value!=='object'||Array.isArray(value)||value.error)throw new Error('invalid_mcp_result');return value};return $input.all().map((item,index)=>({json:decode(item.json),pairedItem:{item:index}}));

const decode=raw=>{let value=raw.structuredContent??raw.content?.find(x=>x.type==='text')?.text??raw;for(let i=0;i<4;i++){if(typeof value==='string'){value=JSON.parse(value);continue;}if(value&&typeof value==='object'&&!Array.isArray(value)&&Object.keys(value).length===1&&Object.hasOwn(value,'result')){value=value.result;continue;}break;}if(!value||typeof value!=='object'||Array.isArray(value)||value.error)throw new Error('invalid_mcp_result');return value};return $input.all().map((item,index)=>({json:decode(item.json),pairedItem:{item:index}}));

const must=(ok,code)=>{if(!ok)throw new Error(code)};const id=v=>Array.isArray(v)?v[0]:v;const created=$('Decode Created Record').first().json;const result=$input.first().json;const records=result.records??result;const record=Array.isArray(records)?records[0]:records;if(!record||record.id!==created.id)throw new Error('record_verification_missing');const expected=$('Consume Approval').first().json.payload.journal_id;must(id(record.company_id)===1&&id(record.journal_id)===expected&&record.state==='posted'&&record.is_reconciled===false,'bank_unreconciled_postcondition');return [{json:{id:created.id,record}}];

parameters.query: UPDATE phase8.events SET status='completed',odoo_model=$2,odoo_record_id=$3,updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING idempotency_key,status,odoo_model,odoo_record_id
UPDATE phase8.events SET status='duplicate',odoo_model=$2,odoo_record_id=$3,updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING idempotency_key,status,odoo_model,odoo_record_id

WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO phase8.exceptions(exception_id,idempotency_key,error_class,reason_code,owner) SELECT md5($1 || ':approval_prewrite_failed')::uuid,$1,'permanent','approval_prewrite_failed',owner FROM phase8.events WHERE idempotency_key=$1 ON CONFLICT (exception_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING exception_id) UPDATE phase8.events SET status='exception',updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING COALESCE((SELECT exception_id FROM ins),md5($1 || ':approval_prewrite_failed')::uuid) exception_id,status

WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO phase8.exceptions(exception_id,idempotency_key,error_class,reason_code,owner) SELECT md5($1 || ':odoo_write_or_verify_uncertain')::uuid,$1,'uncertain','odoo_write_or_verify_uncertain',owner FROM phase8.events WHERE idempotency_key=$1 ON CONFLICT (exception_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING exception_id) UPDATE phase8.events SET status='uncertain',updated_at=now() WHERE idempotency_key=$1 RETURNING COALESCE((SELECT exception_id FROM ins),md5($1 || ':odoo_write_or_verify_uncertain')::uuid) exception_id,status
